title: Help find missing Pacaltsdorp woman
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Bonny Brink-Lawrence was reported missing from her home in Delville Park on Monday 15 January.


> She was last heard from at 09:00 on Monday morning.


She weighs about 65 kg, is 1,65 m tall and has dark brown hair.

According to her husband Quinten Lawrence, it is believed that she used a Bolt-taxi near Pick n Pay in Pacaltsdorp to meet him at the George home affairs office, but she never arrived.

Urgent help is sought to locate her.

Please contact WO William Van Schalkwyk at 082 778 7251 or her husband at 083 290 0351 with any information.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
